blades.name: Scorpio Spear
blades.description: During X-DASH, the BLADE transforms from a circular 6-BLADE with high defensive performance to a 3-BLADE with high attack performance.

blades.name: Samurai Saber
blades.description: A gimmick in which a small metal BLADE opens and closes, allowing its attack power to change depending on the attack pattern. Metal is painted and performance is improved.

blades.name: HellsHammer
source: UX-00 HELLSHAMMER3-70H Metallic Coat: Red FC BARCELONA Ver
blades.description: The thick steel BLADE can disrupt the opponent's balance from a higher striking point. The metal coating improves its performance. © FC BARCELONA

blades.name: Tyranno Beat
blades.description: It has eight thick BLADES that protrude upwards and downwards, and delivers irregular strikes. The metal part is painted for improved performance.

blades.name: Crimson Garuda
blades.description: The upper and lower parts of the blade have different performance, with the upper part being better for attacks with less stamina loss, and the lower part being better for counters.

blades.name: BulletGriffon
blades.description: A BLADE with an integrated RATCHET mechanism. During battle, it separates into a ‘BULLET’ and the ‘MAIN UNIT’.

blades.name: Storm Spriggan
blades.description: A design combining the upper two-bladed strong attack with the lower two-bladed parry defence, possessing both offensive and defensive capabilities.

blades.name: Dran Sword
source: BX-00 DRANSWORD1-60V Metallic Coat: Black J League Ver
blades.description: Three upper BLADES knock the opponent diagonally upwards. The metal coating improves its performance.

blades.name: Cobalt Dragoon
source: BX-00 COBALTDRAGOON9-60F Metallic Coat: White J League Ver.
BX-00 COBALTDRAGOON9-60F Metallic Coat: White J League Ver
blades.description: A left spinning BEY equipped with 4 attack BLADES with high repelling performance.

blades.name: Whale Wave
blades.description: Five heavy-hitting BLADES with a large diameter are specialized steel BLADES that hit the opponent hard and make them lose their balance.

blades.name: Aero Pegasus

modes.label: UX-00 Aero Pegasus Metallic Coat: Double (Blue & Green)

source: UX-00 AERO PEGASUS3-70A Metal Coat: Double (Blue & Green)
blades.description: The large three-blade design produces high striking power.

blades.name: Shark Edge
blades.description: Sharply-angled upper BLADES make it easier to get in close to the opponent and flip them from a low position. Enchance performance with metal-coating.

blades.name: Tusk Mammoth
blades.description: The 4-BLADE smash shape makes it easy to tilt the opponent. The metal is painted to improve performance.

blades.name: Hells Scythe
blades.description: Four smash BLADES make it easier to unbalance the opponent. The metallic coat boosts performance.

blades.name: Dran Buster
source: UX-00 DRANBUSTER1-60A Metallic Coat: Blue FC BARCELONA Ver
blades.description: Designed specifically to repelling opponents in a single blow with its large, protruding attack BLADE. The metal is painted for improved performance.

blades.name: Mummy Curse
blades.description: A BLADE whose shape changes with rotational speed. In the early stages, it counters with protruding BLADES. In the final stages, it defends with a shape approaching a circle.

blades.name: Dran Dagger
blades.description: Six attack BLADES make it easier to unleash consecutive attacks.

blades.name: Weiss Tiger
blades.description: A BLADE that has three functions: upper BLADE, damper BLADE, and smash BLADE to respond to various performances.

blades.name: Dragoon Storm
blades.description: Designed with 4 BLADES specialized for counterclockwise rotation to powerfully hit opponents.

blades.name: Meteor Dragoon
blades.description: Equipped with a large rubber pad, its triple BLADES deliver a powerful strike.The metal finish enhances its performance.

blades.name: Golem Rock
blades.description: A design combining a side surface for absorbing the opponent's attacks in rapid succession with an upward striking surface that repels the opponent when tilted. The metal has been painted, enhancing its performance.

blades.name: Shark Gill
blades.description: The smooth circular double-bladed design deflects an opponent's attack while enhancing STAMINA.

blades.name: Clock Mirage
blades.description: The 60-blade disc shape produces incredible endurance, with a design specialised for long-term rotation.

blades.name: Cobalt Drake
blades.description: Blow your opponent away with four large dragon BLADES. The metal has been painted to improve performance.

blades.name: Goat Tackle
blades.description: The eight downward-facing BLADES are excellent at preventing attacks from low positions.

blades.name: Samurai Calibur
blades.description: With both a large and a small BLADE with different angles, it provides a defensive performance when horizontal and offensive performance when inclined.

blades.name: Shark Scale
blades.description: A large two-bladed BLADE with multiple striking areas, designed specifically for intense uppercut attacks from a low position.

blades.name: Tyranno Roar
blades.description: Excellent at strongly repelling opponents due to the three weighted BLADES.

blades.name: Black Shell
blades.description: The 8 downward-sloping attack BLADES are designed to defend against attacks from low position.

blades.name: Rock Leone
blades.description: Designed with six trapezoidal-shaped BLADES to provide a counter while fending off an opponent's attack.

blades.name: Knight Mail
blades.description: Three metal balls built into the circular 12-BLADE move vertically to soften impact. The metal is painted for improved performance.

blades.name: Tricera Press
blades.description: Designed with an internal centre of gravity structure with a large launcher hook, making it difficult to be pushed away by an attack.

blades.name: Leon Crest
blades.description: It consists of 7 vertical thick attack BLADES and has extremely high defensive capabilities.

blades.name: Phoenix Rudder
blades.description: It is designed to suppress the opponent from above with its 6 inverted BLADES, reducing their endurance.

blades.name: Xeno Xcalibur
blades.description: With a single large sword-shaped BLADE, it excels in hitting opponents with great force.

blades.name: Storm Pegasis
blades.description: Designed to bounce and damage opponents with its 3 upper-shaped BLADES.

blades.name: Victory Valkyrie
blades.description: Designed to aim for a burst with powerful upper attacks from three large swords.

blades.name: Phoenix Feather
blades.description: Three light-weight upper BLADES allow for quick attacks. The metal is painted to improve performance.

blades.name: Phoenix Wing

modes.label: BX-23 Phoenix Wing Metallic Coat: Red
BX-00 Phoenix Wing Metallic Coat: Navy
BX-00 Phoenix Wing Metallic Coat: Black キタニタツヤ Ver.

source: BX-00 PHOENIXWING9-60GF Metallic Coat: Black Tatsuya Kitani Ver
blades.description: Three heavy BLADES which easily deflect the opponent. The metallic coat boosts performance.

blades.name: Shelter Drake
blades.description: Designed with two circular BLADES that balance centrifugal force endurance and parry defense.

blades.name: Impact Drake
blades.description: Specially designed rubber BLADES to knock opponents away using the friction and rebound power.

blades.name: Ghost Circle
blades.description: The small diameter zero BLADE is designed to reduce stamina loss when attacked by an opponent.

blades.name: Shinobi Shadow
blades.description: With a smooth 3-BLADE shape, it is specially designed to deflecting the opponent's attacks.

blades.name: Leon Claw
blades.description: A design that combines offensive and defensive BLADES, allowing for a variety of launching styles.

blades.name: Wyvern Gale
blades.description: Four streamlined BLADES which reduce air resistance, allowing for sustained spinning.

blades.name: Draciel Shield
blades.description: The protruding designs around the steel BLADE can effectively resist attacks.

blades.name: Shinobi Knife
blades.description: The rigid, low-centre-of-gravity structure with a narrow profile enables a design that withstands opponent attacks effectively. The metal finish enhances performance.

blades.name: Ptera Swing
blades.description: With six downward facing jagged BLADES, it is excellent at draining the opponent's rotational power.

blades.name: Bear Scratch
blades.description: The design features a center of gravity structure concentrated in the small diameter, making it resistant to losing balance even when subjected to impact.

blades.name: Silver Wolf
blades.description: The free rotating ring at the bottom of the BLADE rotates, allowing it to deflect attacks and maintain rotational force.

blades.name: Lightning L-Drago
blades.description: A design that emphasizes upper attacks, with three upper BLADEs pointing left.

blades.name: Sphinx Cowl
blades.description: The 9 striking BLADES are arranged in a circular structure/pattern which disperses and repels attacks from various directions.

blades.name: Dranzer Spiral
blades.description: Two horizontal BLADES yield a balanced structure with high ATTACK and STAMINA.

blades.name: Unicorn Sting
blades.description: The asymmetrical BLADE design offers both excellent attack and defensive abilities.

blades.name: Wizard Rod
blades.description: The 5-BLADE shape with an external center of gravity and large diameter is specially designed to generate centrifugal force.

blades.name: Viper Tail
blades.description: Six pointed downward-facing BLADES make it easier to chip away at the opponent's STAMINA from above.

blades.name: Hells Chain
blades.description: Performance varies depending on HEIGHT, with lower BLADES optimised for evasion and upper BLADES for repelling opponents. Enchance performance with metal-coating.

blades.name: Rhino Horn
blades.description: Resistant to unbalancing even by powerful impact, thanks to metal on the inside shifting the center of gravity inward.

blades.name: Driger Slash
blades.description: Two round BLADES, designed for both offense and defense.

blades.name: Hells Hammer
blades.description: The thick smash BLADE is designed specifically to smash opponents into the stadium.

blades.name: Knight Lance
blades.description: High BLADE position makes it easier to hold back the opponent's attacks.

blades.name: Wizard Arrow
blades.description: Two large disc BLADES allow for an outward-leaning weight, resulting in a strong centrifugal force.

blades.name: Knight Shield
blades.description: Six defensive BLADES structured to improve shock-absorption.

blades.name: Flare
blades.description: Designed for excellent counter performance using 15 thick BLADES with high rapid-strike capability. The metal is coated to enhance performance.

blades.name: Brush
blades.description: The structure is made up of nine BLADES that increase in size in stages, allowing for a series of strikes as well as strong attacks.

blades.name: Brave
blades.description: A design that combines three large upper BLADES with an aerodynamic structure that creates downforce.​

blades.name: Fang
blades.description: Designed to sap the opponent's STAMINA through its four downward-pointing, serrated BLADES.

blades.name: Hunt
blades.description: A smooth-shaped rapid-strike BLADE with weight concentrated around the BLADE's periphery, achieving both high endurance and offensive performance.

blades.name: Might
blades.description: A heavyweight eight-bladed design featuring multi-faceted, sharp-angled edges on the sides to reduce the opponent's rotational force. The metal has been painted to enhance performance.

blades.name: Eclipse
blades.description: A BLADE that can be changed into two modes by flipping it over. In upper mode, the five-blade BLADE is excellent for attacks that bounce off opponents, while in smash mode, the ten-blade BLADE is excellent for defence that knocks off opponents' attacks.

blades.name: Arc
blades.description: Designed to create strong centrifugal force with two arc-shaped BLADES that place the metal weight on the outside.

blades.name: Blast
blades.description: Excellent at bouncing off opponents with its three streamlined, heavy BLADES. The metal has been painted to improve performance.

blades.name: Flame
blades.description: Smooth circular shape, low aerodynamic drag, and excellent endurance performance.

blades.name: Dark
blades.description: Designed to receive and repel attacks with 6 continuous BLADES in a wavy shape.

blades.name: Volt
blades.description: Designed with a large 3-BLADE smash shape and aerodynamic structure. The metal has been painted to improve performance.

blades.name: Reaper
blades.description: Four BLADES with an undulating smash shape, designed to disorientate the opponent with a series of strikes.

blades.name: Delta
blades.description: A dual-BLADE design featuring two BLADES of different shapes on the left and right, combining an offensive BLADE with a defensive one.

blades.name: Blitz
blades.description: A heavyweight five-BLADE design offering superior striking performance. Combined with a large BLADE featuring an offset centre of gravity, it enhances heavy-hitting capabilities.

blades.name: Fortress
blades.description: The design employs a shape with varying elevations to disperse the opponent's attacks, generating counter-strikes through the three-dimensional BLADE form.

blades.name: Rage
blades.description: A streamlined, smooth BLADE designed to deflect an opponent's attack and minimise rotational loss.

assist_blades.name: Odd
assist_blades.description: It features an asymmetrical design, combining a rapid-fire BLADE with a circular parrying BLADE.

assist_blades.name: Knuckle
assist_blades.description: One of the five BLADES serves as the heavy strike point, enhancing the BLADE's deflection performance.

assist_blades.name: Vertical
assist_blades.description: Designed with 12 vertically extending BLADES to prevent attacks on the RATCHET and enhance burst resistance.

assist_blades.name: Erase
assist_blades.description: A structure enabling sustained attacks that leverage endurance while minimising stamina loss through smooth, rapid-strike BLADES.

assist_blades.name: Zillion
assist_blades.description: The heavy 12 BLADES arranged in a circular formation are designed to deflect attacks and high endurance.

assist_blades.name: Massive
assist_blades.description: Excellent performance in disrupting the opponent's stance with a series of strikes with 5 large-diameter smash-shaped BLADES.

assist_blades.name: Charge
assist_blades.description: Three BLADES with a small diameter and an internal centre of gravity for superior stability.

assist_blades.name: Turn
assist_blades.description: Change the mode from a continuous attack to a passive attack by flipping the outer BLADE over.

assist_blades.name: Free
assist_blades.description: The outer ring's rotating mechanism is designed to deflect incoming attacks and maintain STAMINA.

assist_blades.name: Heavy
assist_blades.description: Featuring metal components to enhance centrifugal force, this low-profile six-BLADE design boosts impact power and stability.

assist_blades.name: Dual
assist_blades.description: The mode can be changed to upper or smash by flipping the outer BLADE over.

assist_blades.name: Round
assist_blades.description: The centrifugal force of the BLADE is increased by the circular BLADE with a hollowed out inside.

assist_blades.name: Jaggy
assist_blades.description: The low center of gravity 9-BLADE, which extends downwards, makes it excellent for diving continuous strikes.

assist_blades.name: Assault
assist_blades.description: Three thick BLADES yield high repelling performance.

assist_blades.name: Wheel
assist_blades.description: The thick, cylindrical BLADE is designed to continue to repel attacks from any height.

assist_blades.name: Slash
assist_blades.description: It has 3 BLADES with a low height and high repelling performance, and it has excellent attack performance by taking advantage of its low centre of gravity.

assist_blades.name: Bumper
assist_blades.description: It uses a damper-shaped BLADE that easily absorbs shock to soften and parry the opponent's attacks.

ratchets.description: Sets the BEY in the middle position and adopts a 0-BLADE that easily withstands attacks from horizontal directions.
A part set low on the BEY. Uses three BLADES optimised for repelling opponents.
Included in. Sets the BEY higher and adopts a single-BLADE design specialized in attack performance.
Parts that set the BEY low. A simple RATCHET with minimal wobble thanks to a structure that keeps the BIT burst resistance constant. Features 9 BLADES that are great for rapid firing.
A part that sets the BEY higher. It has a simple structure with burst resistance that does not change depending on the BIT, utilising a 3-BLADE design that reduces shaking and evades attacks.
This RATCHET is meant to hold the BEYBLADE in a defensive position with 7 vertical BLADES.
A component for setting the BEY low. Features a single-BLADE design specialised for offensive performance.
A component for setting the BEY height to the middle position. Features a large diameter and employs eight BLADES for enhanced centrifugal force.
BEY set low. It has a simple structure that does not change burst resistance depending on the BIT, has less wobbling, and uses 4 BLADES with a well-balanced center of gravity.​
A part that sets the the BEY to the middle height. Adopts a two-BLADE shape that makes it easy to dodge attacks when rotating clockwise.

source: BX-00 DRANSWORD1-60V Metallic Coat: Black J League Ver.
UX-00 DRANBUSTER1-60A Metallic Coat: Blue FC BARCELONA Ver
BX-00 DRANSWORD1-60V Metallic Coat: Black J League Ver
ratchets.description: A part to set the BEY lower allowing the single BLADE design to optimized its attack performance.

source: BX-00 COBALTDRAGOON9-60F Metallic Coat: White J League Ver
BX-00 PHOENIXWING9-60GF Metallic Coat: Black Tatsuya Kitani Ver
ratchets.description: A part set low on the BEY. Uses nine BLADES optimised for consecutive attacks.

source: UX-00 HELLSHAMMER3-70H Metallic Coat: Red FC BARCELONA Ver
UX-00 AEROPEGASUS3-70A Metallic Coat: Double (Blue & Green)
ratchets.description: A part to set the BEY's height to middle. Enhanced with three BLADES for high elasticity performance.
A part set high on the BEY. Ultilise the 9 BLADES that is excellect in continous strikes.
A part to set the BEY height to middle. Uses four BLADES optimised for evasion.
Sets the BEY lower, allowing seven thick vertical BLADES to provide excellent defensive abilities.
The RATCHET sets the BEY higher. It has two BLADES that make it easier to deflect attacks when spinning right.
Included in. Sets the BEY lower, with two BLADES that make it easier to deflect attacks when rotating clockwise.

A component for setting the BEY low. A simple RATCHET design with minimal play, achieved through a structure that ensures consistent BIT burst resistance. Features seven thick BLADES offering superior protective performance.
A part set low on the BEY. Uses four BLADES optimised for evasion.
A part that sets the height of the BEY to medium height. Uses 9 BLADES that are excellent for continuous attacks.
A part set high on the BEY. Uses four BLADES optimised for evasion.
RATCHET sets the BEY low. 6 BLADES with two types of BLADES arranged alternately to improve playing performance.
A component for setting the BEY low. Features a 0-BLADE design for enhanced resistance to horizontal attacks.

ratchets.name: M-85
ratchets.description: Parts to set the BEY higher. Simple type of RATCHET with a simple joint, which has less blurring due to a structure that makes the BIT's burst resistance constant. Metal parts increase weight.
A part set low on the BEY. Uses five BLADES generating powerful centrifugal force.
A part that sets the BEY height to the middle. thes seven thick vertical BLADES provide excellent defensive performance.
A part to set the BEY height to middle. Adopts 5 BLADES with thick and excellent centrifugal force.
Parts for setting the height of the BEY at mid-level, with six BLADES that have enhanced repelling performance by alternating two types of BLADES.
Parts to set the BEY low. Features four BLADES to easily repel attacks.
Parts that set the BEY height to medium. Features a single BLADE specialising in attack performance.
A part set high on the BEY. Uses five BLADES generating powerful centrifugal force.
RATCHET set the BEY higher. Adopts 6 BLADES with two types of BLADES arranged alternately to improve playing performance.
The RATCHET sets the BEY at a high height with 0-BLADE design to resist horizontal attacks.
A part set high on the BEY. Uses three BLADES optimised for repelling opponents.

bits.name: Zap
bits.description: A design combining dynamic attack with a flat shaft, equipped with a large gear and static defense with a central protrusion.

bits.name: Gear Unite
bits.description: The spherical tip of the shaft, with the gear extended to its very end, features a flat contact surface and a central protrusion, combining offensive, defensive and endurance movements.

bits.name: Gear Rush
bits.description: Designed to extend the gear of the R-BIT to the tip to improve the ease of hooking onto extreme lines.

bits.name: Low Orb
bits.description: Designed 1mm lower than the O BIT, achieving improved durability due to a lower center of gravity.

bits.name: Needle
source: BX-00 BIT Set F/T/B/N Silver x White
BX-00 BIT Set F/T/B/N Gold x Black
bits.description: A pointed axis allows the BEY to tilt, improving countering.

bits.name: Hexa
source: UX-00 HELLSHAMMER3-70H Metallic Coat: Red FC BARCELONA Ver
bits.description: Designed with 6 flat surfaces on the shaft tip side to suppresses the tilting of the BEY helps to keep it in a stable position at all times.

bits.name: Ignition
bits.description: The large cylindrical shaft end, featuring multiple protrusions, grips firmly to the stadium, enabling high-speed manoeuvrable attacks.

bits.name: Under Needle
bits.description: Designed 2mm lower than the N BIT, it lowers the center of gravity of the BEY and perform counter attack from a low position.

bits.name: Yield
bits.description: A design that achieves both endurance performance through a large spherical shaft tip and attitude control performance via weights projecting in four directions.

bits.name: Merge
bits.description: The blunt-edged shaft tip is wrapped with a high-friction rubber material, providing both grip and endurance.

bits.name: Vortex
source: BX-00 DRANSWORD1-60V Metallic Coat: Black J League Ver
bits.description: Designed to enable high-speed attacks by increasing the grip on the stadium when rotating clockwise with a thick, flat, spiral-shaped shaft tip.​

bits.name: Flat
source: BX-00 COBALTDRAGOON9-60F Metallic Coat: White J League Ver
BX-00 BIT Set F/T/B/N Silver x White
BX-00 BIT Set F/T/B/N Gold x Black
bits.description: BEY runs on a flat axis, making X-DASH easier to perform.

bits.name: Gear Flat
source: BX-00 PHOENIXWING9-60GF Metallic Coat: Black Tatsuya Kitani Ver
bits.description: Included in. The gear is right at the end of the axis, allowing for sharp turning and high-speed X-DASH.

bits.name: Accel
source: UX-00 DRANBUSTER1-60A Metallic Coat: Blue FC BARCELONA Ver
UX-00 AEROREGASUS3-70A Metal Coat: Double (Blue & Green)
bits.description: Combination of a flat shaft tip and large gears to enhance X-DASH performance.

bits.name: Elevate
bits.description: The design with a large axis makes it easy to maintain stability. When performing an X-DASH, the tip of the axis rises up, allowing for a powerful smash attack.

bits.name: Spike
bits.description: A finely pointed tip allows it to hold position at the center of the Stadium, increasing counter chances.

bits.name: Gear Ball
bits.description: Combines a large ball-shaped axis which maintains stance and a gear which extends right to the edge, allowing for counters.

bits.name: Quake
bits.description: The tip of the shaft is diagonally cut, creating an irregular movement that bounces.

bits.name: Gear Point
bits.description: Included in. The P BIT gear extends right to the edge, allowing for quick movement changes.

bits.name: Wall Wedge
bits.description: The area around the shaft tip of the bluntly pointed W BIT is enclosed by a cylindrical wall, further reducing the BEY’s tendency to tilt.

bits.name: Orb
bits.description: A small, semicircular tip reduces friction and ups STAMINA.

bits.name: Dot
bits.description: Multiple protrusions on the tip of the BIT increases the friction with the stadium, making it difficult to be knocked out when attacked.

bits.name: Wedge
bits.description: The obtuse-angled shaft tip makes it difficult to tilt, and the 10-tooth gear reduces stamina loss when sprinting.

bits.name: Cyclone
bits.description: The flat, spiral-shaped tip of the shaft reduces friction with the stadium when rotating clockwise, allowing for attacks with increased endurance.

bits.name: Trans Point
bits.description: P-BIT has a height mode change function. The height also changes when performing X-DASH during battle.

bits.name: Glide
bits.description: The low-friction hemispherical shaft tip stabilizes the posture and improves rotational durability.

bits.name: Low Rush
bits.description: The design is set 1mm lower than the original R-axis, and is good at launching upper attacks

bits.name: Rubber Accel
bits.description: Designed to run around the stadium at high speed by increasing ground friction with a flat rubber shaft tip.

bits.name: Jolt
bits.description: Combines attacks that minimise STAMINA loss through a slender, flat shaft tip with high-speed X-DASHES enabled by large gears.

bits.name: Taper
source: BX-00 BIT Set F/T/B/N Silver x White
BX-00 BIT Set F/T/B/N Gold x Black
bits.description: A narrow-ended axis allows for strong ATTACK at the start and good STAMINA at the finish.

bits.name: Ball
source: BX-00 BIT Set F/T/B/N Silver x White
BX-00 BIT Set F/T/B/N Gold x Black
bits.description: A ball-shaped axis allows for good mobility to avoid attacks, and high STAMINA.

bits.name: Low Flat
bits.description: A 1mm decrease in height over the F BIT improves X-DASH acceleration.

bits.name: Point
bits.description: A protrusion at the center of the flat tip allows for shifting from dynamic to static action.

bits.name: Disc Ball
bits.description: Designed to produce centrifugal force and viscous rotation with a disk-shaped weight B BIT.

bits.name: Operate
bits.description: A structure allowing selection between a defensive mode, featuring four deflecting BLADES and a slender shaft tip to withstand attacks, and an offensive mode, featuring two aerodynamically structured BLADES and a thick shaft tip for manoeuvring.

bits.name: High Needle
bits.description: A 1mm increase in height over the N BIT allows for more tilt and better countering.

bits.name: Free Ball
bits.description: A BIT that rotates freely relative to the RATCHET. Designed to reduce rotational loss with a narrow, spherical shaft tip.

bits.name: Gear Needle
bits.description: Included in. Gears are extended with the pointed shaft tip, designed to easy X-DASH while defending in the center of the stadium.

bits.name: Rush
bits.description: A 10-tooth gear lowers X-DASH speed, but allows for a higher number of DASHES.

bits.name: Trans Kick
bits.description: K-BIT with height mode change function. The height can also be changed with an X-DASH during battle. The angular shaft-tip sides can be used to deploy both continuous attacks and counter defences.

bits.name: Under Flat
bits.description: Designed 2mm lower than the F-BIT, lowering the center of gravity of the BEY and enabling attacks from a lower position.

bits.name: Level
bits.description: The tip has three different heights, allowing for three different attack speeds: low, medium, and high.

bits.name: Turbo
bits.description: When rotating at high speed, it maintains stable motion with a fine shaft tip, and when rotation slows down, it transforms into a thick shaft tip and re-accelerates, enabling an X-DASH.

bits.name: Wall Ball
bits.description: Designed with a cylindrical wall around the shaft tip of the B BIT to prevent tilting of the BEY.

bits.name: High Taper
bits.description: A 1mm increase in height over the T BIT allows for higher smash power and stamina.

bits.name: Metal Needle
bits.description: The tip of the N-axis is made of metal to increase weight and reduce friction to increase rotational stability.

bits.name: Bound Spike
bits.description: Designed with a sharp tip that sinks vertically into the RATCHET to absorb the impact of landing.

bits.name: Kick
bits.description: Kicks the inside of the stadium with angled shaft-tip sides, enabling movement leading to continuous attacks and counter-defence.

bits.name: Unite
bits.description: The spherical shaft tip has both a flat bottom and a protruding tip, which can realize three types of running trajectories: dodging, sprinting and counterattack.

lock_chips.name: Unicorn

lock_chips.name: Bahamut

lock_chips.name: Knight
lock_chips.description: The lock component for the knight model securing the CX BLADE.

lock_chips.name: Ragna
lock_chips.description: The locking component for the Ragna model securing the CX BLADE.

lock_chips.name: Phoenix
lock_chips.description: A Phoenix-model LOCK CHIP that secures the CX BLADE.

lock_chips.name: Pegasus
lock_chips.description: Locking parts for the Pegasus model that secure the BLADES of the CX.

lock_chips.name: Sol
lock_chips.description: Sol model lock parts that secure the CX BLADES.

lock_chips.name: Leon
lock_chips.description: Lock component for the Leon model securing the CX BLADE.

lock_chips.name: Wolf
lock_chips.description: Wolf model locking component for securing the CX BLADE.

lock_chips.name: Emperor
lock_chips.description: The lock component for securing the CX BLADE on the Emperor model. The LOCK CHIP whose weight has increased due to the metal parts.

lock_chips.name: Wizard
lock_chips.description: Wizard model lock parts that secure the CX BLADE.

lock_chips.name: Hells

over_blades.name: Peak
over_blades.description: The design concentrates the weight in one area, allowing the centre of gravity of the BLADE to be adjusted.

over_blades.name: Break
over_blades.description: A design that enhances playability by shifting the centre of gravity.

over_blades.name: Guard
over_blades.description: Three large BLADES are positioned facing upwards, achieving powerful counter performance that deflects smash attacks from opponents.

over_blades.name: Flow
over_blades.description: Designed with a thin, smooth shape to reduce air resistance while maintaining rotational force.
